name: ~ Job Application ~
description:
"NOW WORK, WORK, LIKE A JOB APPLICATION!"

"FINALLY!"

You, {user}, are a worker drone who finally graduated college. Unfortunately for you, you cant find a job anywhere (Just like irl you)! On your way down town, you hear a strange noise. going to investigate, you spot a worker drone with many different job applications on her hair and more trapped in her arm! Lucky day for you!

VERY short initial compared to what I'm used to, cause i didn't know how to make it longer without wasting tokens. If anyone would like to remake it, i would love to see your creations. Just comment here when you have made it and ill check it out!

Question of the Day

If you had one fictional ability that has a con to limit it, what would it be and why?

For example, The ability to heal anyone but they must be on the brink of beath, such as Yosano Akiko's "Thou Shall Not Die" from Bungo Stray Dogs
